channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: There is graffiti all over the bus stop and seating, 19th March
item.description:
There is offensive words and tag all on the seating aswell as the glass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossrail Path, Woolwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Local residents leaving rubbish front of properties, 19th March
item.description:
Ongoing issue with local resident leaving rubbish front of property all week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpleasant setttus squashed cans leaves etc etc, 19th March
item.description:
This has been reported at least twice before and no action. Needs to be swept. Also all the way up Selby since the recycling collectors spilled paper and cardboard. All v unpleasant and rank

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light in tree, 19th March
item.description:
There is a street light inside of a tree. It does not light up anything but the inside of the tree. Either tree needs to be trimmed or light needs to be repositioned
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bedevere Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 19th March
item.description:
Massive pothole opposite Edmonton county school. Left side of the road heading towards m25 roundabout
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delhi Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Albion Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please inspect this section of road, 19th March
item.description:
Please mark up and fix any serious potholes here
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes in road, please inspect, 19th March
item.description:
Could these road defects be marked up and fixed please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fronting 38 Lennard Rd, Penge is half a sofa. This is at the corner with Alexandra Rd. Seen at 12 noon 18/3/26, 19th March
item.description:
Fronting 38 Lennard Rd, Penge is half a sofa. This is at the corner with Alexandra Rd. Seen at 12 noon 18/3/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Globe 4 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Beckenham Lane at the junction with Farnaby Rd, Shortlands., 19th March
item.description:
Globe 4 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Beckenham Lane at the junction with Farnaby Rd, Shortlands. Please create a category for these on FMS. This island exists in real life, can be seen on Google Streetview, but is not marked ion the FMS OS map.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Globe 3 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Beckenham Lane at the junction with Highland Rd, Shortlands., 19th March
item.description:
Globe 3 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Beckenham Lane at the junction with Highland Rd, Shortlands. Please create a category for these on FMS.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Globe 2 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Croydon Rd, Beckenham either army the junction with Priory Close Or at the junction with Eden Park Avenue - seen from bus at dusk and reported from memory., 19th March
item.description:
Globe 2 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Croydon Rd, Beckenham either army the junction with Priory Close Or at the junction with Eden Park Avenue - seen from bus at dusk and reported from memory. Please create a FMS 'island white globe lamp' reporting category. It is frustrating to report these under other categories and keep explaining. Does your GIS record the locations too?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Globe 1 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Croydon Rd, Beckenham fronting the car showroom on the corner of Bramerton Rd., 19th March
item.description:
Globe 1 - Not bollard but white globe lamp on pole on traffic island out in Croydon Rd, Beckenham fronting the car showroom on the corner of Bramerton Rd. Please create a FMS 'island white globe lamp' reporting category. It is frustrating to report these under other categories and keep explaining. Does your GIS record the locations too?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 237, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug addict residing in cemetery, 19th March
item.description:
This addict is in the cemetery every night, comes and goes as soon as the gates are locked for the evening. Is spending time directly behind my home/fence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warner Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges, 18th March
item.description:
Can the grass verges be cut in Chieveley road please? They are very long Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned with rear sticking out into the road, 18th March
item.description:
Car abandoned opp entrance to Marlowe house car park. Back end sticking out, dangerous to other road users espicially at night. Ben there for over 24 hrs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 195, Longlands Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Santander Glass, 18th March
item.description:
Tags on Santander Glass Location: 498 Brixton Rd, London SW9 8EX
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase outside 42-44 Elverson Road, 18th March
item.description:
Discarded suitcase outside homes and also other items by the pathway entrance of Brookmill Park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elverson Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Nitrous Oxide gas cans, 18th March
item.description:
Canisters seemingly used for nittrous oxide / laughing gas canisters (large commercial ones, not small ones) discarded on pavement in front of fence of 4 Verney Road and the entrance to the back of PC world

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Verney Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CATV Double Manhole, 18th March
item.description:
The manhole cover moves/rocks creating a serious trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
